s: Science-backed milestones to help you quit for good
d: Track your recovery with science-backed milestones Quitter helps you quit smoking, vaping, alcohol, drugs, adult content, social media, and more—with research-backed health milestones that show exactly what's happening in your body as you recover. Features: - 13 pre-built addiction trackers with cited medical milestones - Custom tracker for any addiction - Daily journaling to process your journey - Milestone notifications to celebrate progress - Completely private—no account required - 100% free and open source Every milestone is backed by medical research from sources like the NHS, CDC, and peer-reviewed journals. See real improvements at 1 day, 3 days, 1 week, 1 month, and beyond. Your data never leaves your device. No ads, no tracking, no subscriptions. Found a bug or have a feature request? Visit https://github.com/brandonp2412/Quitter/issues
